heading: Additional penalties
label: 847 Additional penalties
text: Any penalty imposed for violation of this subchapter shall be in addition to, and not in lieu of, any civil or administrative penalty or sanction authorized by law.
notes: Effective DateSection effective on first day of seventh calendar month that begins after , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 26, 1970section 704 of Pub. L. 91–513section 801 of this title
